bird.name: 橘黃巨嘴鳥
bird.summary: 橘黃巨嘴鳥（Pteroglossus bailloni），又名橘黃山鸚、番紅巨嘴鳥或番紅鵎鵼，是一種巨嘴鳥。牠們以往分類在Baillonius屬中，但其實是屬於Pteroglossus屬。牠們分佈在阿根廷東北部、巴西東南部及巴拉圭東部的大西洋森林。 橘黃巨嘴鳥的尾巴較長，全長3…

locations.name: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约
locations.summary: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约（法語：Louis Pierre Vieillot，1748年5月10日—1830年8月24日）是法国的鳥類學家。 维埃约是第一批用卡尔·林奈式二名法科学描述鸟类的研究者之一。至少有26个他命名的鸟类至今仍在学术界使用…

locations.name: 大西洋沿岸森林
locations.summary: 大西洋沿岸森林 （葡萄牙語：Mata Atlântica）是一片涵盖热带亚热带湿润阔叶林、热带亚热带干旱阔叶林、熱帶亞熱帶草地、稀樹草原和疏灌叢和红树林于一体的热带雨林保护区，位于巴西大西洋沿岸，最北到达北里约格朗德州，最南到达南里奥格兰…

relations.subject: 橘黃巨嘴鳥
relations.evidence: The saffron toucanet (Pteroglossus bailloni) is a species of bird in the family Ramphastidae found in the Atlantic Forest in far north-eastern Argentina, south-eastern Brazil, and eastern Paraguay

relations.subject: 橘黃巨嘴鳥
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss, degradation, hunting, and being captured. They are currently considered Near Threatened by BirdLife International. It occurs in several protected areas, such as the Itatiaia National Park and Intervales State Park; both in south-eastern Brazil
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 橘黃巨嘴鳥
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss, degradation, hunting, and being captured. They are currently considered Near Threatened by BirdLife International. It occurs in several protected areas, such as the Itatiaia National Park and Intervales State Park; both in south-eastern Brazil
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 橘黃巨嘴鳥
relations.evidence: They are a popular choice for the illegal bird trade. They are also in danger from being hunted by humans. Due to deforestation, they are prone to local extinction in smaller forest fragments. Managers are working to reduce the loss of biodiversity with their large reserves
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
